read_authority_boundary: Adapter may inspect the approved operation target and issue payload hash only.
write_authority_boundary: Adapter may not execute unless approval audit passes and a later execution command receives scoped credentials.
freshness_check: Reject if target_operation.expires_at has passed or payload hash changes.
side_effect_boundary: At most one GitHub issue creation matching the approved payload hash.
not_proven: Adapter capability alignment is ready only as bounded preflight governance evidence. It does not prove live GitHub execution safety, credential validity, provider output correctness, billing safety, or rollback execution success.
notes: Preflight boundary is ready; live provider execution remains out of scope for v8.7.
